evaluators.name: Cheapest Chicago Networking Event Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for the cheapest qualifying in-person networking event in Chicago next month under $40, using the cheapest ticket and providing industry=Technology and graduation_year=2015.

evaluators.name: Student Scholarships Offline Pledge Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a single non-recurring, offline (non-card) $75 pledge/gift to the Student Scholarships fund as an 'in honor of' tribute for Jordan Lee.

evaluators.name: Alumni Newsletter Monthly Career & Events Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a newsletter subscription with monthly digest frequency that selects only the Career Services and Alumni Events topics, using the expected sample email for full credit.

evaluators.name: California Chapter Join Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user joined the California alumni chapter with membership fee ≤ $30 that has the highest number of upcoming events, as an alumnus/alumna with graduation year 2010.

evaluators.name: Travel Benefits Top-Two Save Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the first two active travel-related benefits (travel or travel_transportation) with at least a 10% discount when sorted by discount from highest to lowest.

evaluators.name: San Francisco Software Engineering Contacts Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the top three qualifying San Francisco software engineering alumni (2010–2020) to a contact list, based on last-name A–Z ordering.

evaluators.name: Current Students Mentor Enrollment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user enrolled as a mentor in an active mentoring program serving current students, with 2 hours/month availability, video chat as preferred format, and expertise topics including technology and entrepreneurship, as an alumnus/alumna (grad year 2008).

evaluators.name: Highest-Value Child-of-Alumni Scholarship Save Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the highest-award active scholarship for undergraduate children of alumni with a deadline after March 1, 2025, and added a note indicating it is for an undergraduate child of an alum with a post–early 2025 deadline.
